title: Lead Investment Banker at Niva Bupa

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Niva Bupa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
